complaints.title: Water dripping from bathroom pipe
complaints.description: There is an active leak in the ceiling piping of room B-302's bathroom. It drips continuously and has pooled water on the floor, posing a slip risk.
complaints.summary: Bathroom leak causing wet floor; assigned to plumber Ramesh. Priority high due to slip risk.

complaints.title: Slow internet speeds & dropouts
complaints.description: The wifi router closest to room B-302 frequently drops connection. When active, download speeds are under 1Mbps.
complaints.summary: Unstable Wi-Fi in block B, corridor 3rd floor. Connection drops repeatedly.

leaves.reason: Attending sister's wedding ceremony in Kolkata.
leaves.letterText:
Respected Warden,

I am writing to formally request leave from the hostel starting tomorrow for a period of three days. I need to travel home to Kolkata to attend my sister's wedding ceremony, which is a major family event requiring my presence.

I will make sure to catch up on any missed academic classes and return to the hostel promptly. I request you to kindly approve my leave and issue a gate pass.

Yours sincerely,
Ananya Roy
CSE Department

Respected Warden,

I need to apply for hostel leave from 2026-04-23 to 2026-04-25 because of Food poison. Kindly approve.

Sincerely,
anushiya

visitors.purpose: Bringing home-cooked food and checking in on academic health.

notifications.title: Account Registered Successfully
notifications.message: Welcome, anushiya! Your account has been created successfully. Welcome to the Smart AI Hostel Portal.

notifications.title: Annual Sports Day Registrations
notifications.message: Registrations for the Annual Hostel Sports Tournament are now open. Register at the warden office before July 10.

notifications.title: Visitor Pass Approved
notifications.message: Your visitor pass request for Mrs. Sunita Roy (Mother) has been APPROVED by Warden Suresh Sharma.

notifications.title: Hostel Fee Pending
notifications.message: Friendly reminder: Your Hostel Admission Fee of ₹45,000 is due on July 25, 2026.

messages.content:
Hello! I am your AI Hostel Assistant. 🎓⭐

I can help you:
- 📝 Write and submit Leave Letters
- 🛠️ File Maintenance complaints (with auto priority classification)
- 🚪 Book Visitor Passes
- ⏰ Check Curfew rules and fee timings

How can I help you today?

Hello! I am your AI Hostel Assistant. You can ask me to file a complaint, generate a leave letter, register visitors, or ask questions about hostel rules, timings, fees, and mess menu.

*Try saying: "I need leave for 2 days" or "Water is leaking in my room B-302".*

messFeedback.comment: The Sunday Special Veg Thali and Biryani was absolutely stellar!
The Wednesday Paneer was really good, but please reduce the oil content slightly.

notices.title: Hostel Fee Payment Deadline Approaching
notices.content: All students are requested to clear their Semester Hostel and Mess Fees on or before July 25, 2026. Late fees will apply after the deadline. Please pay online via the student portal or submit a draft at the accounts section.

notices.title: Maintenance Work: B-Block Water Pipe Line Upgrade
notices.content: Please note that water supply in B-Block will be partially affected on Sunday, July 5, between 10 AM and 2 PM due to main pipeline upgrading works. Please store water in advance. We regret the temporary inconvenience.
